summary: Frontend testing of LeadFinder mobile responsiveness and dark/light mode toggle. All features verified working correctly on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080). Theme toggle switches between dark/light mode with localStorage persistence. CSV tab buttons wrap properly on mobile. Mobile CSV cards show all required fields including notitie input and copy phone button.
passed_tests: TEST 1: PASS - Theme toggle button (data-testid='theme-toggle-button') visible on desktop
TEST 2: PASS - Theme toggle button visible on mobile (390x844)
TEST 3: PASS - Clicking theme toggle switches from dark to light mode (html class changes from 'dark' to '')
TEST 4: PASS - Theme stored in localStorage ('light' after toggle)
TEST 5: PASS - Sun icon shows in dark mode, Moon icon shows in light mode
TEST 6: PASS - CSV tab shows lead count badge '3' next to upload icon
TEST 7: PASS - CSV header buttons (IMPORTEREN, OPSLAAN, EXPORT, WISSEN) wrap properly on mobile
TEST 8: PASS - IMPORTEREN button at x=16, y=138, width=142
TEST 9: PASS - OPSLAAN button at x=166, y=137, width=103
TEST 10: PASS - EXPORT button at x=277, y=137, width=92
TEST 11: PASS - WISSEN button wraps to second row at x=16, y=179, width=91
TEST 12: PASS - Bulk WhatsApp bar stacks vertically on mobile with full-width button (332px)
TEST 13: PASS - Mobile CSV cards show naam (business name)
TEST 14: PASS - Mobile CSV cards show categorie with separator
TEST 15: PASS - Mobile CSV cards show 'Geen website' in red text
TEST 16: PASS - Mobile CSV cards show telefoon with phone icon
TEST 17: PASS - Mobile CSV cards have copy phone button (Copy icon)
TEST 18: PASS - Copy phone button works - toast 'Gekopieerd!' shown
TEST 19: PASS - Notitie input field visible on mobile cards (data-testid='csv-note-mobile-*')
TEST 20: PASS - Notitie field is editable with placeholder 'Notitie toevoegen...'
TEST 21: PASS - WhatsApp button visible on mobile cards (green, 284px width)
TEST 22: PASS - Delete button (trash icon) visible on mobile cards
TEST 23: PASS - Search input full width on mobile (332px)
TEST 24: PASS - Filter buttons (Alle, Alle Status) wrap properly on mobile
TEST 25: PASS - Leads tab header/buttons are mobile-friendly with flex-wrap
TEST 26: PASS - Dashboard stats cards in 2-column grid on mobile (first: x=16, width=173; second: x=201, width=173)
TEST 27: PASS - Tools tab cards in single column on mobile (all cards x=16, width=358)
TEST 28: PASS - All 5 tabs (ZOEKEN, CSV, LEADS, STATS, TOOLS) accessible on mobile with icon-only display
critical_code_review_comments: Theme toggle implementation uses ThemeContext with toggleTheme function correctly (lines 6-7, 81-82)
Theme toggle button has proper data-testid='theme-toggle-button' (line 887)
Sun/Moon icons correctly swap based on isDark state (line 889)
CSV tab count badge implemented correctly with conditional rendering (lines 875-879)
Mobile CSV cards (lines 1395-1462) include all required fields: naam, categorie, plaats, website/geen website, telefoon, copy button, notitie input, WhatsApp button, delete button
Copy phone button uses navigator.clipboard.writeText with toast feedback (line 1435)
Bulk WhatsApp bar uses flex-col on mobile with full-width button (lines 1157-1175)
CSV header buttons use flex-wrap for proper mobile layout (lines 1124-1152)
Dashboard stats grid uses grid-cols-2 for mobile 2-column layout (line 1596)
Tools grid uses sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 for responsive single column on mobile (line 1668)

theme_toggle.details: Sun icon in dark mode, Moon icon in light mode. Clicking toggles html class between 'dark' and ''. Theme persisted in localStorage.

csv_tab_count_badge.details: Badge shows '3' next to CSV tab upload icon, updates with lead count.

csv_header_buttons_mobile.details: IMPORTEREN, OPSLAAN, EXPORT on first row; WISSEN wraps to second row on 390px viewport.

bulk_whatsapp_mobile.details: Bar stacks vertically with full-width button (332px on 390px viewport).

mobile_csv_cards.details: Cards show: naam, categorie, plaats, website/geen website (red), telefoon with copy button, notitie input, WhatsApp button, delete button.

notitie_field_mobile.details: Input field visible with placeholder 'Notitie toevoegen...', editable, has data-testid.

copy_phone_button.details: Copies phone to clipboard, shows 'Gekopieerd!' toast.

dashboard_mobile_grid.details: Stats cards in 2-column grid (grid-cols-2) on mobile.

tools_mobile_layout.details: Cards in single column on mobile, full width (358px on 390px viewport).

leads_tab_mobile.details: Header/buttons use flex-wrap, filter dropdowns wrap properly.

seed_data_creation: 3 test leads already exist in database: Salon Beauty, Nieuw Bedrijf, TEST_Legacy_1775593535
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40: Verified LeadFinder mobile responsiveness and theme toggle. Key data-testids: theme-toggle-button, csv-import-title, csv-import-button, csv-save-all, csv-export-button, csv-clear-all, bulk-whatsapp-bar, bulk-whatsapp-button, csv-lead-card-*, csv-note-mobile-*, csv-search-input, csv-no-website-toggle, csv-status-filter, csv-stat-*. Theme uses ThemeContext with localStorage persistence. Mobile viewport 390x844 tested. All 5 tabs work on mobile with icon-only display. CSV tab has 3 test leads. Password: yrvante2025.
